name: redis
description: Redis -- get, set, del, exists, expire, hset, hget, keys

src/suite.ts.methods: redis(config: RedisConfig): this { this.redisConfig = config; return this; }

src/types/suite.ts.service-types: redis: { get(key: string): Promise<string | null>; set(key: string, value: string, ttlSeconds?: number): Promise<void>; del(key: string): Promise<number>; exists(key: string): Promise<boolean>; expire(key: string, ttlSeconds: number): Promise<boolean>; hset(key: string, field: string, value: string): Promise<number>; hget(key: string, field: string): Promise<string | null>; keys(pattern: string): Promise<string[]>; quit(): Promise<void>; };
